name: Stitch Fix, Inc.
summary: Stitch Fix is an online personal styling service founded in 2011 that delivers curated shipments of apparel, shoes, and accessories (called Fixes) selected by human Stylists aided by proprietary AI and recommendation algorithms. Clients can also purchase directly via Freestyle on the website or mobile app. The company offers womens, mens, kids, petite, maternity, and plus apparel across private and national brands, operating exclusively in the United States with approximately 2,309,000 active clients as of August 2, 2025.
